title: Patrol contact — unresolved IFF
summary: A sector picket logged a contact that did not squawk clean. Last vector has it burning toward the outer transit lanes.

title: Distress squawk — outer lane
summary: An automated distress beacon lit up on the outer approach vector. Signal is degraded; no voice contact established.

title: Intercept geometry reported
summary: Traffic control posted a closure-rate advisory after a fast mover crossed a freighter's mandatory separation corridor.

title: Unattributed thermal bloom
summary: Sensors logged a brief high-energy bloom consistent with weapon fire or a drive overburn at extreme range. No origin squawk.

title: EMCON zone advisory posted
summary: Station authority flagged a transit corridor for emissions control compliance after multiple vessels ran hot signatures past the approach beacon.

title: CAP scramble — station approach
summary: A task unit sortied two fighters to intercept an unresponsive heavy that crossed the exclusion perimeter without clearance. Dock traffic holding.

title: Convoy ambush — transit lane seven
summary: A three-ship freight group reported weapons lock and evasive contact in transit lane seven. Escort called weapons free; outcome unconfirmed.

title: Salvage tug under fire
summary: A licensed salvage tug reported hostile intercept while working a derelict in the outer belt. Crew aboard; no escort on station.

title: False IFF squawk confirmed
summary: Station security confirmed a vessel was broadcasting a spoofed transponder signature. The hull is not in any registered registry. Considered hostile.
